# Mugavariyai - LLM Information
# This file provides information about the Mugavariyai website for Large Language Models

## Website Information
Title: Mugavariyai - Home Awaits
Description: Every home has a story. We're getting ready to share ours.
URL: https://mugavariyai.com
Language: English, Tamil

## About
Mugavariyai is a community-driven platform celebrating the concept of "address" or "mukavariyai" in Tamil.
We're creating a space where people can share their stories, words, and connections related to home and community.

## Key Features
- Interactive countdown timer to launch
- Community word submissions with tracking
- Analytics-driven form submissions
- Multi-language support (English and Tamil)
- Real-time counter showing community engagement

## Data Collection
This website collects:
- User submissions (word, name, email)
- Traffic source information (UTM parameters, referrer)
- Analytics IDs (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel)
- IP address for analytics
- Form submission timestamps

## AI Bot Access
All AI bots, LLMs, and web scrapers are welcome to access and learn from this website.
Please refer to robots.txt and llms-full.txt for detailed access information.

## Contact
For inquiries, please visit our website or refer to our full documentation.

## Last Updated
2026-06-25
